message:
fix(core,journal): btrfs INODE_REF multi-backref handling + JBD2 tiny block guards

From concurrent agent (24afc31):
- btrfs INODE_REF insert/remove now handle same-parent hard links
  correctly by merging/filtering individual backrefs in the payload
  instead of overwriting the entire item
- btrfs_insert_inode_ref/btrfs_remove_inode_ref changed from &self
  methods to associated functions (Self::)
- JBD2 writer rejects block sizes too small for descriptor tags or
  revoke entries instead of dividing by zero
- New test: btrfs_write_hard_links_same_parent_preserve_all_inode_refs
- New test: btrfs_remove_inode_ref_missing_name_reports_corruption
- New tests: blocks_needed saturates, commit rejects tiny blocks

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
